# Selinexor 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Selinexor 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Selinexor</strong> 目前有 <strong>14 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Selinexor 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：NEXPOVIO is indicated  in combination with bortezomib and dexamethasone for the treatment of adult patients with multiple myeloma who have received at least one prior therapy. in combination with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（99.2%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（97.2%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（97.2%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（97.2%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（97.1%）</li>
<li>squamous cell lung carcinoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>gestational trophoblastic neoplasm（96.5%）</li>
<li>cervical neuroblastoma（96.3%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of jugular foramen（96.3%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of floor of mouth（96.3%）</li>
<li>epiglottis neoplasm（96.2%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of tongue（96.2%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of hypopharynx（96.2%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of buccal mucosa（96.2%）</li>
<li>jugular foramen meningioma（96.2%）</li>
<li>neoplasm of major salivary gland（96.2%）</li>
<li>nasal cavity inverting papilloma（96.2%）</li>
<li>vestibulocochlear nerve neoplasm（96.2%）</li>
<li>inner ear neoplasm（96.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/selinexor/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
